name: Wirken: long-running exec tool call
message:
Wirken exec tool call took longer than 30 seconds.

Detection: exec_fork_pairing (2), long-running subset
Severity baseline: medium

Pivot via @wirken.session_id and @wirken.event.call_id to find the matching AssistantToolCalls row (Datadog log-link by call_id).

The `@exec_duration_ms` field is materialised by a Datadog log parsing pipeline that joins `tool_result` rows to the preceding `assistant_tool_calls` row by (session_id, call_id) and computes the timestamp delta. The Datadog log-link itself does the join at query time; the pipeline pre-computes the duration for monitor-side thresholding.

For failed-exec alerts, file a sibling monitor with `@wirken.event.success:false` and drop the duration clause.

@security-team
